name: openwispr
description: Tiny floating widget that records, transcribes, cleans up, and pastes at cursor.

scripts.icon: node build/make-icon.js && iconutil -c icns build/icon.iconset -o build/icon.icns

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: openwispr needs the microphone to record your voice for transcription.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: openwispr uses System Events to paste transcribed text at your cursor.
